description: Renovate configuration for the kryptos CLI (Go module + CI tooling)
dependencyDashboardHeader:
Tracks dependency updates for the kryptos CLI (Go module + CI image).

**After merging**: auto-tag cuts the next `vX.Y.Z` release from the merged Conventional Commits; the tag pipeline runs goreleaser + the Harbor OCI publish.

---

packageRules.description: Group all charm.land/* TUI deps (huh, lipgloss, bubbletea) together

Disable the built-in dockerfile manager for the golang dep in .ci/docker/Dockerfile. The FROM line uses ARG indirection (`FROM golang:${GO_VERSION}-alpine`), so the built-in manager infers a literal `golang:<tag>-alpine` string that doesn't exist in the file — producing 3 zombie ghost branches per cron (pin-dependencies, golang-1.25.x, golang-1.x) that emit 'Cannot find replaceString' and never create PRs. The customManagers regex above tracks the ARG via the `# renovate:` annotation instead.

Disable digest-pinning for the custom.regex ARG-managed golang dep in .ci/docker/Dockerfile (the annotated-ARG manager now comes from the shared dockerfile-args preset). With pinDigests the inherited `docker:pinDigests` (config:best-practices) issues a digest re-pin that builds a malformed `manifests/<tag>@sha256:<digest>` HEAD → 404 ('Could not determine new digest') every run. pinDigests:false suppresses the probe; a real go tag bump still rewrites tag+digest via the autoReplaceStringTemplate, so the digest stays current. Scoped to custom.regex so it never touches the native dockerfile/gomod managers.
